name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts and green bell pepper into strips.
2. Cut the onion and tomato into thin wedges.
3. Place the chicken strips, green bell pepper strips, onion wedges, garlic, and oregano in a large bowl.
4. Pour the Italian dressing over the ingredients.
5. Toss lightly to combine.
6. Refrigerate for at least 10 minutes (the longer the better).
7. Drain any excess liquid from the chicken mixture.
8. Stir fry the chicken mixture in the oil until the chicken is thoroughly browned.
9. Stir in the tomato wedges.
10. Wrap the tortillas in dampened paper towels.
11. Microwave on HIGH until softened, about 45-90 seconds.
12. Fill the tortillas with the chicken mixture and serve with salsa, sour cream, shredded cheese, frijoles or guacamole.
